title: Comforting Chewy Spanish Peas Patatas Bravas
description: A hearty and comforting Spanish dish featuring peas and patatas bravas, perfect for a sick day, made with score fat and vegetarian friendly ingredients. This herbal and chewy dish is a variation of the traditional Catalan recipe.
instructions: Heat the score fat in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced potatoes and cook for about 10 minutes, until they start to brown.
Add the peas, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Pour in the tomato sauce and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture cook, covered, for about 20 minutes, until the potatoes are tender.
Serve the patatas bravas hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
